description: Case style: Analog watch with steel round case Dial style: Cream, olive and black dial with white handsStrap style: Olive fabric strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date apeture on the 3 hour mark and indiglo night lightWater resistant to 100 meter, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.Warranty: 1 year
